utterances.speaker: Ticket Counter Attendant
utterances.text: This is the final boarding call for Flight 664 to Yemen .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I ... I guess I gotta go .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh , my Bing ... a ... ling . I will wait for you . Do you even know how long you are going to be gone ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , just until we find an energy source to replace fuel .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh . Well , I will right you everyday . 15 Yemen Road , Yemen .

emotion_cause.span: 4_just until we find an energy source to replace fuel .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Janice ! There you are ! There you are !

emotion_cause.span: 10_Janice ! There you are ! There you are !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I had to have one last kiss , and also ... also you said that you were going to leave right after I got on the plane !

emotion_cause.span: 11_I had to have one last kiss , and also ... also you said that you were going to leave right after I got on the plane !

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: No ! No ! I wanna see you take ... off .

emotion_cause.span: 12_No ! No ! I wanna see you take ... off .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , then I guess I am going to Yemen !
